text: Quentin finally puts on his shirt. Typical Frenchman — they're late to everything! Right, let's get this match underway.
A wet one out there this morning, both sides feeling their way through midfield.
The shot's blocked — but it's lobbed over the top, and it's IN! The deadlock is broken!
End to end already on this damp morning!
Brody tees it up — Blake shoots...
...and he SCORES! And that's one for the side not in orange!
Klody lobs it to Graham — surely he scores...
...and he doesn't! Unbelievable! That ridiculous white headband — all fashion, no finish!
Lovely through-ball by Quentin, through the middle!
Thomas, through on goal, surely this is a goal... but he bollockses it up completely!
And Orange are straight back — Milton with the interception, perfect!
Graham threads a clever ball forward...
Klody sets up Blake — Blake shoots — and it's wide! Ohh!
Evan to Quentin, on to Thomas — but Victor nips in to intercept!
Victor rolls it out to Walter...
...and Walter buries it! And the Orange lads are seething — they've conceded that one!
Brody to Walter, knocking it about at the back...
Walter out to Blake, and back to Klody — a slick one-two... but there's no finish.
Good midfield play — Ricky back to Nirun, Nirun to Ian in the baby blue, and Ian to Milton.
Milton back to Soren in the white.
Milton down the right to Brody, who whips the cross in to Klody in the box — and he misses it! Oh, what a howler!
After Soren's intervention, Milton steps in and feeds Brody in the middle...
...Brody shoots — and it cannons comically off Klody's back! No goal, you couldn't make it up!
Shane's got it at the back for Orange, and plays it into Tomasz in the centre of the box...
Ian slips it to Brody — and here comes Graham on a brilliant run! Brody lays it right...
...and Graham drills it low, through a huddle of defenders, right into the middle of the net — GOAL! What a run, what a finish!
Abel with a big switch out to Shane...
Graham slides it through to Klody...
...Klody shoots — and it's IN! Klody with the goal!
...and Graham finally loses possession there.
Edwin back to the Frenchman, and out to Shane...
...the shot from the right cracks off the crossbar! Ohh, so close!
And the Frenchman — he's got his goal at last! Oh, that'll cheer him right up!
Soren on it, down the left flank...
...and he finds Blake.
Victor back to Blake...
...Blake's effort is really a cross — and Walter pokes it home! A goal for the side NOT in orange!
Marcos plays it out to the right...
...but Milton intercepts! Walter, Klody — and Klody finishes, past Tom! And Tom looks thoroughly frustrated!
Tom plays it down the left to Quentin...
...Quentin goes for the cross — but Ian blocks it, and scrambles to clear!
Abel, a shot — and it's IN! Abel scores!
Nirun down the left for Graham — but Abel reads it and intercepts!
Walter wins the ball back!
And it's wide — that's half time!
No need for Cain, mate — that's why he's Abel, he's more than able!
Right, I'm off for a pie, lovely!
